---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Why do you need it?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Which package does this affect?

- [ ] `packages/cli` — Terminal agent
- [ ] `packages/web` — Web app
- [ ] Both

## Example usage

Show an example of how the feature would be used:

```bash
# CLI example
dawood /your-new-command
```

or describe the UI change for the web app.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
